title: agrostis stolonifera subsp. castellana
intro: Agrostis stolonifera subsp. castellana, also known as the creeping bent grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera subsp. castellana include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
